subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! Set aflame the horizons of every heart, and kindle a light within the lamp of contingent being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اشتعل بنار محبت الله در قلب آفاق شعله زن و در زجاجه امکان سراجی برافروز
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual transformation
